waking_words.name: Waking words
waking_words.hint: Treat message as mentioned if any wake word appears

zh.name: 唤醒词
zh.hint: 如果消息中包含任一唤醒词，则视为被提及

zh.name: 接收未提及消息
zh.hint: 将未提及的消息作为上下文传入

max_unmentioned_messages.name: Max Unmentioned Messages
max_unmentioned_messages.hint: Max unmentioned messages to include in context buffer

zh.name: 最大未提及消息数
zh.hint: 上下文缓冲区中包含的最大未提及消息数

group_chat_prompt.name: Group Chat Prompt
group_chat_prompt.hint: Extra prompt to guide AI behavior in group chats

zh.name: 群聊提示词
zh.hint: 引导 AI 在群聊中行为的额外提示词

group_proactive_chat.name: Group Proactive Chat
group_proactive_chat.hint: Allow AI to send messages proactively in group chats, be sure to have receive_unmentioned enabled

zh.name: 群聊主动发言
zh.hint: 允许 AI 在群聊中主动发送消息，请确保已启用接收未提及消息

group_proactive_chat_probability.name: Group Proactive Chat Probability
group_proactive_chat_probability.hint: Probability of triggering a proactive message (default 0.1)

zh.name: 主动发言概率
zh.hint: 触发主动发言的概率（默认 0.1）
